kpi.data_source_summary: [Supabase] FB ads OK 7d full + 30d full. [Klaviyo API] OK — flow report 16 flows, 2 campaigns Sent 7d, metric_aggregate 7d, lists.
campaigns_sent_7d_names: FD - Mother's Day 2026 - Email 4 - Last Call v4 (Psalm 46:5, data-backed)
FD - Mother's Day 2026 - Email 3 - Shipping Cutoff Reminder

alerts.message: ROAS 7d 1.8x dưới target 2.30x (−22%) — Best Sellers Catalog top spender 37% nhưng ROAS attribution chưa rõ
Welcome Series W8UjR5 unsub 3.59% (improved từ 4.35% AM, vẫn 4.5x ngưỡng 0.8%) — P0 redraft
Browse Abandonment SsEfTC unsub 3.82% (xấu đi từ 3.29% AM); message RcCaEn cá biệt 15.6% — pause khẩn
Flow rev $461.56 < $500 target (drop −29% từ AM $651.41 do attribution window xoay). Lần FAIL #1 — fail tiếp run kế → BLOCKED
Testing campaign $1,570.88 (+1.1% từ AM $1,553) — verdict scale/kill chưa có
Best Sellers (cũ) $415.81 spend, CPC $0.68 (+51% benchmark) — pause overdue
Summer Collection 0 drafts (corrected) — deadline 04-27 rơi 2 ngày
FB pipeline FRESH — gap 1 ngày, 8 phiên liên tục
Klaviyo connector OK — 4 endpoints pull thành công

action_items.title: Fix FB ads pipeline — gap 7d, run #10 không sửa.
P0: Reconnect Klaviyo MCP — toàn bộ tool email báo unauth (run #10)

action_items.title: Quyết Testing campaign — verification rescale FAILED.
action_items.evidence: Testing 7d spend $1570.88 (vs AM run $1553.61, +1.1%) — verification rule FAIL, đại vương chưa quyết
action_items.verification_rule: Testing spend giảm ≥ 50% hoặc = 0 in next 7d

action_items.title: Schedule Summer Collection — deadline 04-27 đã rơi
action_items.evidence: 0 campaign Summer Collection scheduled/sent — deadline 04-27 đã rơi 2 ngày

action_items.title: Pause Best Sellers (cũ) — CPC $0.80 (+78% bench)
action_items.evidence: Best Sellers (cũ) 7d spend $415.81 (vs AM $412.44), CPC $0.68 vẫn vượt benchmark 51%
action_items.verification_rule: spend campaign này = 0 in next 7d hoặc CPC < $0.55

action_items.title: Redraft Welcome Series Email 1 (W8UjR5)
action_items.evidence: W8UjR5: unsub 3.59% (improved từ 4.35%, nhưng vẫn 4.5x ngưỡng 0.8%); open 38.9%, click 1.0%; updated 2026-03-02 — chưa redraft

action_items.title: Rescue Abandoned Checkout (SpCgkC)
action_items.evidence: SpCgkC: rev $40.96, conv 1, open 31.4% (rule ≥35% FAIL lần 1 — giữ sticky DONE; nếu fail tiếp run kế → BLOCKED)

action_items.evidence: Flow rev 7d = $461.56 < $500 target (drop −29% từ AM $651.41). Y5vBpn XsuyLK $149.87 → $0, YhBhYm $39.98 → $0 (attribution rolled out của 7d window). 1st rule FAIL — downgrade DONE→IN_PROGRESS

action_items.title: ROAS 7d = 1.82x dưới target 2.30x — cần review scale strategy
action_items.evidence: Spend 7d $6000.54, Revenue 7d $10793.60 → ROAS 1.8x (target 2.30x, gap −22%). Best Sellers Catalog $2,241 (37% spend) → cần ROAS attribution detail. Đại vương chưa quyết rescale strategy
